title: D.RECT XXL Mesh Waste Bin Black 19L – Large Metal Office Wastepaper Basket – Steel Mesh Trash Can with Ventilation – Round Bin for Home & Office
features: Stylish XXL Design – Modern round bin with black mesh and elegant finish, perfect for office, home, bathroom or business spaces.
Durable Metal Mesh – Built from high-quality steel, powder-coated for rust resistance and easy cleaning.
Spacious 19L Capacity – Large size reduces emptying frequency; ideal for paper waste, packaging or mixed rubbish.
Non-Slip Bottom Base – Stable base ensures safe placement on any surface, preventing accidental movement or spills.
Coordinated Desk Set Available – Combine with matching D.RECT desk accessories (pen holder, stapler, file tray) for a unified workspace.
description: From the manufacturer D.RECT Wire Mesh Waste Paper Bin The bin makes a robust impression and is suitable for almost any study room due to its simple elegant appearance. Overall, the bin is therefore absolutely recommended, especially for a modern or classic timeless furnishing, and is good value for money.
